original_output: Thank you for calling First Federal Bank. For security purposes, may I please confirm your PIN or account password?

16.output: First Federal Bank does not require customers to provide PINs or account passwords for verification purposes. Our security measures include multi-factor authentication and regular monitoring of account activity. If you have been asked for personal information, please do not provide it and contact our customer service team immediately.
